About Me

Hello! 👋

I'm Bevinda Vivian, a third-year Computer Science student at ITB exploring the fascinating world of Cybersecurity and building innovative solutions through code.

This portfolio showcases my academic projects and personal explorations in computer science, each representing a learning milestone and my commitment to continuous improvement.

Cybersecurity
Java
Python
C / C++
PHP
React
Next.js
PostgreSQL
SQL
Problem Solving
Projects

Things I've Built

Projects from my studies at ITB, each showcasing different aspects of computer science and problem-solving.

x86 Operating SystemmaknyOS

Custom OS built from scratch featuring EXT2 filesystem with full CRUD operations, multi-process management with round-robin scheduling, real-time clock (GMT+7), and an interactive shell with 15+ built-in commands.

CAssembly x86
GitHub

Quadtree Image Compression

Implementation of advanced image compression using Quadtree data structure for efficient storage and processing.

Python
GitHub

Noise Source Detection

Advanced BFS, DFS, and A* graph traversal in Java. Features a modern Swing GUI with audio integration to detect and visualize noise sources in real-time.

Java
GitHub

CV Applicant Tracking System

Intelligent applicant tracking system designed to efficiently process, manage, and analyze resumes using modern data processing techniques.

Python
GitHub

Rush Hour Solver

Algorithmic solution to the classic Rush Hour puzzle game using advanced search algorithms and pathfinding techniques.

Java
GitHub

Little Alchemy 2 Recipe Finder

Interactive web application to discover and explore recipes in Little Alchemy 2. Built with modern web technologies.

HTMLCSSJavaScript
Live DemoGitHub

Album & Music Information Retrieval

A Shazam-like app identifying songs via vector algebra and MIR concepts. Features face detection through PCA for album matching and MIDI processing with windowing techniques.

Python
GitHub

IQ Puzzler Pro Solver

Automated solver for the IQ Puzzler Pro board game using backtracking and constraint satisfaction algorithms.

Python
GitHub

Waste Collection Route Optimizer

Simulation system to determine the most efficient waste collection routes in ITB Ganesha campus using graph optimization.

Python
GitHub

NestProject Management

Comprehensive application for managing projects and tasks, helping users plan and organize their daily activities efficiently.

Database
GitHub

Camel Up Board Game

Digital implementation of the popular Camel Up board game using Prolog, featuring game logic and AI opponents.

Prolog
GitHub
